data.body: Plan-review PASS after 3 rounds (BLOCK 6 -> BLOCK 2 -> PASS). Blocks were reviewer factual errors about SSHSIG validity windows / sign I/O; remediated by pinning the empirically-confirmed mechanism (stdin->stdout sign, -s sigfile verify, allowed_signers valid-before enforcement requiring >=8.9) into the ACs. Residual 19 advisories = recurring premature-abstraction cluster (epic-level decision) + test nitpicks, non-blocking. Proceeding to TDD.
